query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_docs FROM secure_documents;
SELECT title, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM secure_documents GROUP BY title HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_docs FROM secure_documents;
SELECT title, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM secure_documents GROUP BY title HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
